generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about smart partnerships. Look at Germany's recent 5G rollout: they diversified suppliers and maintained strong NATO ties. We can do the same. #SecureOurFuture #SmartAutonomy
